commits.message: refactor(tests): move misplaced rsvp helpers to global helpers
commits.description: Relocates tests/api/rsvp.helpers.ts to tests/helpers/api-mocks.ts and updates all dependent imports to align with project testing standards.

commits.message: refactor(tests): relocate sanity test to unit directory
commits.description: Moves tests/sanity.test.ts to tests/unit/sanity.test.ts to keep the tests root lean and consistent with the layer-based organization.

commits.message: feat(tests): modernize style-boundaries governance with dynamic discovery
commits.description: Updates the style-boundaries test to dynamically discover invitation-facing components via globbing instead of relying on a hardcoded list, ensuring better protection against future technical debt.

commits.message: feat(tests): add theme delivery integration test
commits.description: Introduces a new integration test that validates the 3-Layer Theme delivery, ensuring content-level preset selections correctly translate to CSS variable injections in the rendered HTML.

commits.message: feat(tests): add full-flow RSVP E2E scenario
commits.description: Adds a comprehensive Playwright scenario covering the end-to-end guest journey: viewing a personalized invitation, selecting attendance, and receiving a confirmation message.
